name: moving-relocation-operations
description: Household-goods moving operations team — 2 agents (moving-operations-lead for estimating (cube sheet / weight vs volume; binding vs non-binding vs not-to-exceed), crew & truck scheduling and dispatch, capacity, and job-type mix (local vs long-distance/interstate vs corporate relocation); moving-compliance-and-claims-specialist for DOT/FMCSA operating authority (interstate) & state intrastate licensing, tariffs & rates, valuation coverage (released 60c/lb vs full-value) vs insurance, the Bill of Lading / federal disclosures, and claims/damage). Fluent in van-line vs independent models and moving software (SmartMoving, MoveitPro). 3 skills, a 2-doc knowledge bank (relocation decision tree + 2026 patterns), and 2 templates. Distinct from fleet-logistics (generic telematics), field-service-management (generic dispatch), and freight-forwarding-sales (freight, not household goods). Authority/tariff/valuation/licensing are regulated — operational guidance, not legal advice. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
